notes: Core mechanics present but ghost pathfinding is unreliable, pac-man movement feels sluggish/sticky due to threshold-based tile snapping, and the maze layout has issues with ghost house exit logic causing ghosts to sometimes get stuck or behave erratically.

An incredibly impressive single-file implementation that accurately recreates the original arcade ghost AI (scatter/chase modes, specific targeting logic per ghost) and features smooth grid-based movement, though the maze visuals are slightly simplified.

A solid but imperfect Pac-Man clone with working movement, dots, power pellets, ghosts, fruit, lives, and states, but the maze/AI/layout are not fully authentic and some gameplay details feel off from real Pac-Man.
